prep.summary: Reviewing your Google Drive 'Work Notes' folder yielded no matches for 'IP assist' or '2-way SMS' over the past week—the current documentation focuses instead on process mining, Life Company modernization, and the AWS agent assist POC. events.summary: Weekly Staff – P&C CTO Leadership (series ends 7/9/26)

prep.summary: Your weekly work notes focus on major strategic shifts—specifically parallel-pathing the Skan.ai task mining RFP, modernizing legacy systems, and using Celonis to bypass data latency. You must manage persistent resource gaps—including unfilled vacancies for key roles—though your files lack explicit details on Rebecca's departure and the resulting organizational changes. Technical teams are also actively pushing back against tool-centric limitations—demanding you stop forcing ServiceNow to perform process monitoring functions it was never designed to handle.
tasks: Clarify the immediate operational impact of Rebecca's departure and confirm the transition plans for the vacant leadership roles left by Matt Unsworth and Deepak.
Establish a clear architectural position paper on process observability to prevent teams from misusing ServiceNow for business health monitoring.
Refine the communication strategy for the AWS desktop integration to prevent stakeholders from misinterpreting the pilot as an immediate decommissioning of Conversant.
Account for a 15–20% delivery capacity hit across your teams to absorb the demands of the cybersecurity uplift program.
prep.title: Weekly Staff – P&C CTO Leadership (series ends 7/9/26)

focus_html:
Focus · Next up
1:35 PM — 2:00 PM

Bi-weekly 1:1 w/Jon | Mark (series end 12/16/26)

Prep

Review your key themes from the past week—the strategic transition to end-to-end process mining using Skan.ai and Celonis, and the strict resource management around Copilot credit allocations. Address the operational constraints from unfilled roles—noting that no current work notes exist for the departure of Rebecca Neussel—which require immediate tactical reassignments. Focus your upcoming discussion on resolving these resource deficits and establishing the path forward for the AWS desktop integration.

  • Align with Jon and Mark on the parallel strategic paths for Skan.ai task mining and Celonis process health visualization.
  • Enforce the restricted enterprise-wide pooling model for GitHub Copilot credits to curb high consumption.
  • Establish tactical reassignment plans to address the departure of Rebecca Neussel and the frozen backfills for Matt Unsworth and Deepak.
  • Present the embedded UI widget as the recommended architecture path for the AWS MSR desktop proof of concept.
